backend/scripts/validate_medical_intelligence_architecture.py lines 250-251: condition 'if safety in _BLOCKED_PROMOTION_STATUSES and safety in _UNSAFE_PROMOTION_WITHOUT_OVERRIDE'. _BLOCKED_PROMOTION_STATUSES (lines 52-58) = {'blocked_pending_frame_adjudication', 'blocked_pending_pass3_enrichment', 'blocked_pending_provenance_recovery'}. _UNSAFE_PROMOTION_WITHOUT_OVERRIDE (lines 60-64) = {'safe_for_route_a_promotion'}. Sets are disjoint — no string is a member of both. This condition can never fire. Safe to remove.

changes.check: 2B — Behavioural scope is well-defined; no runtime risk
changes.citation: Allowed changes per prompt: CI workflow update, architecture validation script update, local gate script update, pytest collection/gate update, documentation/report update, carry-forward register update. All are validation/gate/docs artefacts. Runtime boundary section explicitly prohibits: SignalEvaluator, SignalRegistry, runtime loaders, domain_score_assembler, report_compiler, frontend behaviour, SSOT, scoring thresholds, unit conversion, knowledge_bus/packages/*, knowledge_bus/current/latest_knowledge_status.json. STOP condition 2 enforces this at execution time.

Prompt required tests section: validate_medical_intelligence_architecture.py, validate_day_one_architecture.py, test_day_one_architecture_guardrails.py, test_medical_intelligence_architecture_sentinels.py, test_med_frame_identity_index.py, test_context_modifier_catalogue.py — all must pass. No emitted analytical reasoning changes from this sprint (all changes are gate/CI wiring and read-only governance assertions).

changes.check: 2B — STOP conditions are adequate and enforceable
changes.citation: 7 explicit STOP conditions: (1) gate entry point cannot be identified, (2) integration requires runtime changes, (3) integration weakens existing day-one validation, (4) medical-intelligence validator fails, (5) day-one validator fails, (6) sentinel pytest fails, (7) Automation Bus changes unsafe. These cover all critical failure modes.

changes.check: 2B — No STOP conditions triggered by source content review
changes.citation: Gate entry point is identified (golden_gate_local.py checks list). Integration does not require runtime changes (adding validate_day_one_architecture.py to gate checks or CI is a config-level change). Existing day-one validation will not be weakened (adding to it, not replacing). Validators are confirmed correct at the script level. No Automation Bus scripts (run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py) require unsafe changes — golden_gate_local.py checks list modification is within sprint scope.
